title: Smoky Savory Moroccan Rice Noodles Khlea
description: A pungent and pillowy Moroccan dish featuring rice noodles, miso-marinate, and a macrobiotic-friendly twist. This khlea recipe is perfect for adventurous foodies looking for a unique and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: white or yellow miso works best

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality extra virgin olive oil

ingredients.name: cumin
ingredients.notes: ground cumin adds depth of flavor

ingredients.name: coriander
ingredients.notes: ground coriander pairs well with cumin

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher or sea salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use filtered water for best taste

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until it starts to caramelize.
Add the cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper (if using) to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the miso paste to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Add the rice noodles to the saucepan and cook for 8-10 minutes, until they are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
